title: hordeum secalinum var. maritimum
intro: Hordeum secalinum var. maritimum, also known as sea barley or maritime barley, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing anxiety and improving sleep quality due to its sedative properties. In herbal preparations, sea barley is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a poultice to aid in the healing process.
